summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a mellow set with standout versions of Loser, Bertha and Franklin’s Tower.
review: The four reviewers rave about the clean, well‑balanced audio – thanks to careful cleanup and a solid soundboard source – and describe the performance as mellow yet vibrant. Highlights include Loser (ranked in the reviewer’s top 25), Bertha, Fire on the Mountain and a soaring Franklin’s Tower, with Keith’s piano nicely present in the mix.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are 5‑star, praising both the musical performance and the pristine recording; thus the show is exceptional and the soundboard source is excellent.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean-up work noted as effective; audio described as clear, mellow, with keyboards well‑balanced in the mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth, mellow vibe with strong transitions; reviewers highlight the overall energy and enjoyment of the set.

band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s piano is up in the mix and appreciated by listeners.
